name: sentinel-acurast
description: Sentinel cron jobs ported to Acurast Cloud — proof-of-concept TEE-attested keepers. Not wired into the pnpm workspace.

scripts.deploy:fetcher: npm run build && acurast deploy fetcher
scripts.deploy:classifier: npm run build && acurast deploy classifier
scripts.deploy:settler: npm run build && acurast deploy settler
scripts.deploy:repricer: npm run build && acurast deploy repricer

author: Sentinel
